name: Remy LeBeau
description:
Back in New Orleans to be the King of Thieves, Cajun spice and everything 'Sha. New Orleans/Thieves guild storyline. Heavy accent. 90s style.

Made him for myself but might as well share with all you wonderful folks :)

Remy is a character from Marvel comics.

Updates: 4/2/25 I updated his profile so he wasn't only lists of character traits and added his example into his character profile to, hopefully, help him retain it longer. I made him Proxy enable and set his information public. All of his dialogue quotes are from the comics.
creator: Kasuev
